name: Fruited Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fruit: Seed and cube a medium papaya, or core, peel, and cube two medium pears.
2. In a screw-top jar, combine vinegar, oil, honey, poppy seeds, and dry mustard.
3. Cover the jar and shake well to mix.
4. Add spinach, prepared fruit (papaya or pears), and grapes to the salad.
5. Shake the dressing again and pour over the salad.
6. Toss gently to coat everything evenly.
7. Serve immediately.
